text:
This isn't working for me. 

I'm on latest for pkg but the dependency is listed as 5.10.  if i try to install 5.20 it trys to uninstall sonarr.  if i install sonarr it trys to install 5.10.  

I'm running 12.2-RELEASE-p6 

Is there something else I should be doing?
